query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_livestreams,
  SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_liver_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liver_id
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
